goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'old schools'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 14:30'.
The train should go to 'stevenage' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called old schools
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 14:30
The train should go to stevenage and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get price and travel time
